name: 30gal Storage Tote Gray - Brightroom™
description:
Stay organized with Brightroom’s 30 Gallon Storage Bin with Lid. The space-efficient shape features a deep recessed lid which allows totes to stack securely, maximizing vertical storage space. The broad rim adds strength and integrated handles make for easier lifting and carrying. Contain and conceal clutter throughout your home to create a neat and tidy living space! This popular, large size plastic storage container is ideal for sorting and storing bedding, sporting gear, bulky items, and more. Note: Use good judgment when storing items, don’t overload, keep heaviest bin at bottom, and don’t stack too high.
Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
